name: Chemiclash
summary: Creates a powerful shockwave of chemical energy that intensifies and radiates outward from a marked point, instantly affecting everything within a wide area.
effect_description: Creates a powerful shockwave of chemical energy that intensifies and radiates outward from a marked point, instantly affecting everything within a wide area.
